nasb.text: and to offer a sacrifice according to what was said in the Law of the Lord, “A pair of turtledoves or two young pigeons.”

esv.text: and to offer a sacrifice according to what is said in the Law of the Lord, “a pair of turtledoves, or two young pigeons.”

cnv.text: 又照著主的律法所說的獻上祭物，就是一對斑鳩或兩隻雛鴿。

ccb.text: 他们又按照主的律法献上祭物，即一对斑鸠或两只雏鸽。

csbs.text: 并按照主的律法上所说的，献上了“一对斑鸠或两只雏鸽”为祭物。
